    E

    ENTRANCE - Enum constant in enum class game.Tile.Type
     

    F

    FLOOR - Enum constant in enum class game.Tile.Type
     

    G

    game - package game
     
    getColumn() - Method in class game.Tile
    Return the column of this Tile.
    getGold() - Method in class game.Tile
    Return the amount of gold on this Tile.
    getOriginalGold() - Method in class game.Tile
    Return the original amount of gold on this tile (even if picked up.)
    getRow() - Method in class game.Tile
    Return the row of this Tile.
    getType() - Method in class game.Tile
    Returns the Type of this Tile.

    I

    isOpen() - Method in enum class game.Tile.Type
    Return true if this Type of Tile is traversable.

    O

    ORB - Enum constant in enum class game.Tile.Type
     

    T

    takeGold() - Method in class game.Tile
    Set the gold on this Node to 0 and returns the amount "picked up".
    Tile - Class in game
     
    Tile(int, int, int, Tile.Type) - Constructor for class game.Tile
    Constructor: a new Tile at (r, c), with g amount of gold, and Type t.
    Tile.Type - Enum Class in game
    An enum representing the different types of Tiles that may appear in a cavern.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class game.Tile.Type
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class game.Tile.Type
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    W

    WALL - Enum constant in enum class game.Tile.Type
